event.title: 5th International Conference on NLP Techniques and Applications (NLPTA 2024) in London, United Kingdom, United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

body.p: 5th International Conference on NLP Techniques and Applications (NLPTA 2024) will provide an excellent international forum for sharing knowledge and results in theory, methodology and applications of Natural Language Processing.

tags.tag: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
